title: CLI: store received profiles in memory and republish own on connect
description: In the chat event loop (cli/src/commands.rs), handle ClearMessage::Profile by updating a per-session HashMap<PubId, HashMap<String, String>>. On connect (after DirectoryList is received), broadcast the user's own saved profile if one exists. On UserJoined, republish own profile so the new peer gets it. Profile is loaded from and saved to a profile.json in the data dir.
